title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_conflicts
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_conflicts' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

withHunks.description: Parse conflict-marker hunks per file. Set false for just the path list.

maxLinesPerFile.description: Cap on lines scanned per file before marking `truncated: true`.
